caption: Table 222. Document revision history
rows: Updated list of features. Changed datasheet status to "production data". Added UFBGA169 and TFBGA100 packages as well as notes related to TFBGA100 and UFBGA169 status on cover page and in Table 6: STM32H753xI features and peripheral counts. Differentiated number of GPIOs for each package in Table 6: STM32H753xI features and peripheral counts. Updated Error code correction (ECC) in Section 3.4.3: Embedded SRAM. Change PWR_CR3 into PWR_D3CR in Section 3.7.1: Power supply scheme. Updated Section 3.14: Nested vectored interrupt controller (NVIC). Added Table 12: DFSDM implementation in Section 3.25: Digital filter for sigma-delta modulators (DFSDM). Changed PC2/3 to PC2/3_C and VDD33USB to VDD in Figure 9: LQFP100 pinout. Changed PC2/3 to PC2/3_C in Figure 11: LQFP144 pinout. Changed PC2/3 to PC2/3_C in Figure 13: LQFP176 pinout. Changed PC2/3 to PC2/3_C in Figure 15: LQFP208 pinout. Table 17: Pin/ball definition: – Modified PA7, PC4, PC5, PB1, PG1, PE7, PE8 and PE9 I/O structure – TFBGA240 +25: removed duplicate occurrence of F1, F2 and P17 pin; added notes related to F1, F2, G2 pin connection; added note on E1, L16, L17, M16, M17, K16, K17, N17. – UFBGA176+25: changed G10 pin name to VSS. – Added note to VREF+ pin. Added current consumption corresponding to 125 °C ambient temperature in Section 6.3.6: Supply current characteristics. Replaced FMC_CLK by FMC_SDCLK in Section : SDRAM waveforms and timings. Changed description of the last five f values and updated t in Table 96: ADC S LATRINJ characteristics. For TFBGA100, TFBGA240+25 and UFBGA169, updated thermal resistance power- junction in Table 276: Thermal characteristics as well as power dissipation in Table 32: General operating conditions.
Total current consumption changed to 4 µA minimum in Features. Updated Figure 12: UFBGA169 ballout. Updated dpad and dsm in Table 136: TFBGA240+25 - Recommended PCB design rules.

Updated LSI clock frequency and ADC on cover page. Removed note related to UFBGA169 package. Updated ADC features on cover page and in Table 6: STM32H753xI features and peripheral counts. Added Arm trademark notice in Section 1: Introduction. Updated USB OTG interfaces to add crystal-less capability. Updated Figure 3: STM32H753xI block diagram. Updated GPIO default mode in Section 3.10: General-purpose input/outputs (GPIOs). Added ADC sampling rate values in Section 3.19: Analog-to-digital converters (ADCs). Updated Section 3.20: Temperature sensor. Updated LCD-TFT FIFO Size in Section 3.27: LCD-TFT controller. Section 3.37: Serial peripheral interfaces (SPI)/integrated interchip sound interfaces (I2S): changed maximum SPI frequency to 150 Mbits/s. Modified number of bidirectional endpoints in Section 3.44: Universal serial bus on- the-go high-speed (OTG_HS). Table 17: Pin/ball definition: – Updated PC14 and PC15 function after reset. – Changed CAN1_TX/RX to FDCAN1_TX/RX and CAN1_TXFD/RXFD to FDCAN1_TXFD_MODE/RXFD_MODE – Changed CAN2_TX/RX to FDCAN2_TX/RX and CAN2_TXFD/RXFD to FDCAN2_TXFD_MODE/RXFD_MODE Replaced VCAP1/2/3 and VDDLDO1/2/3 by VCAP and VDDLDO, respectively. Updated PA0, PA13, PA14, PC14 and PC15 pin/ball signals in pinout/ballout schematics. Replaced f by f in Section : Typical and maximum current consumption. ACLK rcc_c_ck Replaced system clock by CPU clock and f by f in Section : On-chip ACLK rcc_c_ck peripheral current consumption. Updated Note 2. in Table 35: Reset and power control block characteristics. Updated Table 36: Embedded reference voltage, Table 38: Typical and maximum current consumption in Run mode, code with data processing running from ITCM, regulator ON, Table 39: Typical and maximum current consumption in Run mode, code with data processing running from flash memory, cache ON, regulator ON and Table 44: Typical and maximum current consumption in Stop mode, regulator ON. Updated typical and maximum current consumption in Table 45: Typical and maximum current consumption in Standby mode and Table 46: Typical and maximum current consumption in VBAT mode. Added note to f in Table 57: LSI oscillator characteristics. LSI

Updated Figure 28: VIL/VIH for all I/Os except BOOT0. Added note in Table 93: QUADSPI characteristics in SDR mode, Table 94: QUADSPI characteristics in DDR mode and Table 95: Dynamics characteristics: Delay Block characteristics. Section 6.3.20: 16-bit ADC characteristics: updated THD conditions in Table 97: ADC accuracy; removed formula to compute R . AIN Changed decoupling capacitor value to 100 nF in Section : General PCB design guidelines. Added note in Table 98: DAC characteristics, Table 106: Voltage booster for analog switch characteristics, Table 109: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62-3.6 V, Table 126: Dynamics JTAG characteristics and Table 127: Dynamics SWD characteristics. Updated Figure 145: LQFP144 marking example (package top view), Figure 151: LQFP176 marking example (package top view) and Figure 154: LQFP208 marking example (package top view). Updated TFBGA240+25 package information to final mechanical data.

Added description of power-up and power-down phases in Section 3.7.1: Power supply scheme. Removed ETH_TX_ER from Table 17: Pin/ball definition and Table 18: Port A alternate functions to Table 28: Port K alternate functions. Added note related to decoupling capacitor tolerance below Figure 19: Power supply scheme. Added note 2. related to CEXT in Table 33: VCAP operating conditions. Updated Table 54: HSI48 oscillator characteristics, Table 55: HSI oscillator characteristics and Table 56: CSI oscillator characteristics. Renamed Table 58 into "PLL characteristics (wide VCO frequency range)" and updated note 2.. Added Table 59: PLL characteristics (medium VCO frequency range). Updated T in Table 100: VREFBUF characteristics. coeff Updated t in Table 103: V monitoring characteristics. S_vbat BAT Updated Table 108: OPAMP characteristics.

Changed maximum Arm Core-M7 frequency to 480 MHz. Features: – Changed operational amplifier bandwidth to 7.3 MHz – Updated high-resolution timer to 2.1 ns – Updated low-power consumption feature Changed FMC NOR/NAND maximum clock frequency to 100 MHz in Features and Synchronous waveforms and timings. Updated voltage scaling in Section 3.7.1: Power supply scheme. Added VOS0 in Section 3.7.3: Voltage regulator (SMPS step-down converter and LDO). Updated HSE clock in Section 3.9.1: Clock management. Added note related to VDDLDO in Table 17: Pin/ball definition. Updated Section 6: Electrical characteristics (rev Y): – Added note 2. related to CEXT in Table 33: VCAP operating conditions – Updated f in Table 54: HSI48 oscillator characteristics. HSI48 – Updated t in Table 55: HSI oscillator characteristics. stab – Added Table 70: Output voltage characteristics for PC13, PC14, PC15 and PI8. – Updated Table 68: I/O static characteristics and Figure 28: VIL/VIH for all I/Os except BOOT0. – Added note related to PC13, PC14, PC15 an PI8 limited frequency in Table 71: Output timing characteristics (HSLV OFF). – Updated note 2 below Figure 30: Recommended NRST pin protection. – Table 96: ADC characteristics: updated f and added note related to f formula; S S updated t . CAL – Renamed Section 6.3.24 into Temperature and VBAT monitoring and content updated. – Updated f in Table 109: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62-3.6 V. DFSDMCLK Added Section 7: Electrical characteristics (rev V). Section 8: Package information: – Updated paragraph introducing all package marking schematics to add the new sentence "The printed markings may differ depending on the supply chain." – Added Section : Device marking for TFBGA100 and Section : Device marking for UFBGA169. – Updated Table 276: Thermal characteristics. Added note related to ECOPACK®2 compliance in Table 9: Ordering information.

Updated Figure 3: STM32H753xI block diagram Updated Table 17: Pin/ball definition. Updated Table 18 to Table 28 (alternate functions). Updated Table 47: Peripheral current consumption in Run mode. Updated Table 181: Peripheral current consumption in Run mode. Updated Table 232: ADC characteristics. Updated Table 233: Minimum sampling time vs RAIN. Updated Table 234: ADC accuracy.

Added reference to errata sheet ES0392 in Section 1: Introduction. Section 2: Description Table 6: STM32H753xI features and peripheral counts: removed note indicating that packages are under development, split number of ADC channels into Direct, Fast and Slow channels; and added number of wakeup and tamper pins. Changed APB1 and APB2 maximum frequency to 120 MHZ in Figure 3: STM32H753xI block diagram. Section 3: Functional overview Added connection between SDMMC2 and D2-to-D3 AHB bus in Figure 8: STM32H753xI bus matrix. Updated Section 3.30: True random number generator (RNG). Added Full-duplex mode in Section 3.37: Serial peripheral interfaces (SPI)/integrated interchip sound interfaces (I2S). Updated number of microphones that can be supported by the SAI in Section 3.38: Serial audio interfaces (SAI). Section 5: Pin descriptions Updated J1, F1, F2 and G2 signals and added notes 2, 3 and 4 in Figure 16: TFBGA240+25 ballout. Removed FDCAN1_RXFD_MODE, FDCAN1_TXFD_MODE, FDCAN2_RXFD_MODE and FDCAN2_TXFD_MODE functions from Table 17: Pin/ball definition and all alternate function tables. Additional modifications made on Table 17: Pin/ball definition: added note to VDD50USB, change PB1 I/O structure to TT_a, replaced PI8 WKUP3 additional function by WKUP2, replaced PC13 WKUP2 additional function by WKUP3, changed F1 and G2 to VSS. Section 6: Electrical characteristics (rev Y): – Updated Section 6.2: Absolute maximum ratings introduction to add device mission profile. – Updated Figure 19: Power supply scheme. – Power dissipation (P ) removed from Table 32: General operating conditions D since this parameter is redundant with Θ thermal resistance. JA – Updated Table 50: High-speed external user clock characteristics. – Table 61: Flash memory programming: removed reference to single bank configuration in title and updated t typical and maximum values. ERASE128KB – Added reference to AN4899 in Section 6.3.15: I/O port characteristics. Updated F for speed 10 and 11 in Table 71: Output timing characteristics (HSLV OFF). max Updated notes in Table 72: Output timing characteristics (HSLV ON). – Updated t /t and t t in Table 83: su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT-CLKH) Synchronous multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. Changed t to (NWAIT-CLKH) t and updated t /t and t t su(NWAIT-CLKH) su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT- in Table 85: Synchronous non-multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. CLKH) – Replaced FMC_CLK by FMC_SDCLK in Section : SDRAM waveforms and timings – Updated t and t in Table 89: SDRAM read timings su(SDCLKH _Data) h(SDCLKH _Data) and Table 90: LPSDR SDRAM read timings.

Section 6: Electrical characteristics (rev Y) (continued) – Updated t and t in Table 93: QUADSPI characteristics in SDR mode s(IN) h(IN) t /t and t /t in Table 94: QUADSPI characteristics in DDR mode. sr(IN) sf(IN) hr(IN) hf(IN) Updated Figure 46: Quad-SPI timing diagram - DDR mode. – Updated maximum sampling time (t ) value in Table 96: ADC characteristics. S Updated Figure 47: ADC accuracy characteristics, Figure 48: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT pins featuring analog switch function and Figure 49: Power supply and reference decoupling (V not connected to REF+ V ). DDA – Updated T maximum value in Table 101: Temperature sensor characteristics. L – Updated f and DuCy in Table 109: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62- DFSDMCLK CKOUT 3.6 V. – Updated f to match an APB1/2 maximum frequency of 120 MHZ in TIMxCLK Table 112: TIMx characteristics. – Updated t and t minimum values in Table 115: SPI dynamic su(MI) h(MI) characteristics. – Updated t t , t and t in Table 119: Dynamic characteristics: SD / MMC ISU, IH ISUD IHD characteristics, VDD = 2.7 to 3.6 V, and t t in Table 120: Dynamic ISU, IH characteristics: eMMC characteristics, VDD = 1.71 to 1.9 V. Updated Figure 66: DDR mode. Section 7: Electrical characteristics (rev V): – Updated Figure 75: Power supply scheme. – Updated Section 7.2: Absolute maximum ratings introduction to device mission profile. – Power dissipation (P ) removed from Table 132: General operating conditions D since this parameter is redundant with Θ thermal resistance. JA – Replaced Min V by Min V in Table 133: Supply voltage and maximum DD DDLDO frequency configuration. – Updated Table 183: High-speed external user clock characteristics. – Table 197: Flash memory programming: removed reference to single bank configuration in title, and updated t . ERASE128KB – Updated condition related to f in Section : On-chip peripheral current rcc_c_ck consumption. – Added reference to AN4899 in Section 7.3.19: I/O port characteristics. Changed t to (NWAIT-CLKH) t and updated t /t and t t su(NWAIT-CLKH) su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT- in Table 221: Synchronous non-multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. CLKH) Updated t and t in Table 225: SDRAM read timings su(SDCLKH _Data) h(SDCLKH _Data) and Table 226: LPSDR SDRAM read timings. Replaced FMC_CLK by FMC_SDCLK in Section : SDRAM waveforms and timings. – Updated t and t in Table 229: QUADSPI characteristics in SDR mode and s(IN) h(IN) t /t and t /t in Table 230: QUADSPI characteristics in DDR mode. sr(IN) sf(IN) hr(IN) hf(IN) Updated Figure 108: Quad-SPI timing diagram - DDR mode.

Section 7: Electrical characteristics (rev V) (continued): – Updated notes 4. and 5. in Table 233: Minimum sampling time vs RAIN. Added reference to AN5354 application note in note of Table 232: ADC characteristics. Updated Figure 109: ADC accuracy characteristics and Figure 110: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT pins featuring analog switch function – Changed V maximum value to V -0.2 in Table 235: DAC DAC_OUT REF+ characteristics – Updated T maximum value inTable 238: Temperature sensor characteristics. L – Modified Figure 111: Power supply and reference decoupling (V not REF+ connected to V ). DDA – Updated DuCy in Table 246: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62-3.6 V. CKOUT – Updated Figure 118: USART timing diagram in Master mode and Figure 119: USART timing diagram in Slave mode – Updated t and t in Table 253: SPI dynamic characteristics. su(MI) h(MI) – Updated t t , t , t and t in Table 257: Dynamics characteristics: SD / ISU, IH ISUD IHD OH MMC characteristics, VDD = 2.7 to 3.6 V, and t t in Table 258: Dynamics ISU, IH characteristics: eMMC characteristics VDD = 1.71V to 1.9V. Modified Figure 130: DDR mode. – Added Section : USB OTG_FS characteristics. Section 8: Package information Added Θ and Θ for UFBGA169. JB JC Updated Section 8.1: LQFP100 package information, Section 8.3: LQFP144 package information, Figure 141: TFBGA100 - Recommended footprint, Section 8.6: LQFP176 package information, Section : Device marking for UFBGA176+25, Figure 154: LQFP208 marking example (package top view) and Table 136: TFBGA240+25 - Recommended PCB design rules. Added Figure 151: UFBGA169 - Recommended footprint and Table 304: UFBGA169 - Recommended PCB design rules (0.5 mm pitch BGA). Section 9: Ordering information Added note related to the availability of tape and reel packing in Section 9: Ordering information.

Updated Figure 1: STM32H750xB block diagram changed APB1 and APB2 maximum frequency to 120 MHZ, and WKUP[5:0] to WKUP[6:1]. Changed WKUP[5:0] to WKUP[6:1] in Table 8: Pin/ball definition Updated Figure 3: STM32H753xI bus matrix Updated Table 11: Current characteristics and Table 109: Current characteristics Changed I to I in Table 49: I/O static characteristics and Table 146: I/O static leak lk characteristics Updated Section 3.24: Digital camera interface (DCMI) (modified supported format) Modified Table 45: EMI characteristics for fHSE = 8 MHz and fCPU = 400 MHz and Table 142: EMI characteristics for fHSE = 8 MHz and fCPU = 400 MHz Updated section I/O dynamic current consumption and I/O static current consumption in Section 6: Electrical characteristics (rev Y) and Section 7: Electrical characteristics (rev V). Updated note below Figure 38: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT pins featuring analog switch function and Figure 88: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT pins featuring analog switch function and Updated Table 11: Current characteristics and Table 109: Current characteristics Updated V max value in Table 111: General operating conditions CORE Updated Table 201: Dynamics characteristics: USB ULPI Updated Section 8: Package information: Modified title for footprint figure and PCB design rules table (examples instead of recommendations) Added Section 8.1: Device marking (device marking information removed from package sections and moved to this section) Updated information on pin count in Section 9: Ordering information Added Section 10: Important security notice.

In the context of I2C, replaced master and slave by controller and target, respectively. Updated features on cover page. Updated Table 2: STM32H753xI features and peripheral counts. Updated Figure 1: STM32H753xI block diagram. Updated Section 3.4: Boot modes. Updated Figure 11: TFBGA240+25 ballout Updated Table 7: Legend/abbreviations used in the pinout table. Updated Table 8: Pin/ball definition. Updated Table 9: Alternate functions. Updated Table 13: General operating conditions. Supressed Figure: NAND controller waveforms for common memory write access. Updated Table 76: ADC characteristics. Updated Figure 65: Power supply scheme. Updated Table 111: General operating conditions. Updated Table 113: VCAP operating conditions. Updated Table 126: Peripheral current consumption in Run mode. Updated Section : Low-speed external user clock generated from an external source. Updated Figure 70: Typical application with an 8 MHz crystal. Updated Table 146: I/O static characteristics. Updated Figure 87: ADC accuracy characteristics.

Updated Table 173: ADC characteristics. Updated Table 179: Temperature sensor characteristics. Updated Table 180: Temperature sensor calibration values. Updated Section : I2C interface characteristics. Updated Table 207: LQFP100 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 210: LQFP144 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 213: LQFP176 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 214: LQFP208 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 220: TFBGA240+25 - Example of PCB design rules.
